product: Databricks Container Services for standard compute is now available (Beta)
tagline: Databricks Container Services for standard compute is now in Beta.
what_it_does: Databricks Container Services for standard compute is now in Beta. You can now specify a Docker image when creating standard compute on Databricks Runtime 18.3 or later, allowing you to use custom containers in shared compute environments. Beta Databricks Container Services for standard compute is in Beta.
why_it_matters: For best image pull performance, use a registry in the same cloud and region as your Databricks workspace.
plain_summary: Databricks Container Services for standard compute is now in Beta. You can now specify a Docker image when creating standard compute on Databricks Runtime 18.3 or later, allowing you to use custom containers in shared compute environments.
key_takeaway: Databricks Container Services for standard compute is now in Beta.
